__reviewers: @georgian-hpb-reviewer — გთხოვთ გადაამოწმოთ ტერმინოლოგია (Couinaud სეგმენტები; HPB ქირურგიის ნომენკლატურა). Latin transliteration kept alongside the Georgian script so terminology lookups remain interoperable.

hcc.name: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Hepatocellular carcinoma
hcc.role: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Primary liver malignancy arising from hepatocytes; typically cirrhotic background.

icc.name: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Intrahepatic cholangiocarcinoma
icc.role: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Primary biliary-tract malignancy arising from intrahepatic bile ducts.

metastasis.name: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Metastasis
metastasis.role: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Secondary malignancy — commonly colorectal, pancreatic, breast, or neuroendocrine primaries.

fnh.name: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Focal nodular hyperplasia
fnh.role: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Benign hyperplastic lesion; central scar characteristic on MRI.

hemangioma.name: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Hemangioma
hemangioma.role: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Benign vascular lesion; peripheral nodular enhancement typical.

arterial.name: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Late arterial
arterial.role: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:~30s post-injection; hepatic artery enhancement — HCC and FNH conspicuous.

portal.name: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Portal venous
portal.role: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:~65–75s; liver parenchyma maximally enhanced — metastases conspicuous.

flr.name: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Future Liver Remnant
flr.role: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Post-resection liver volume expressed as % of total liver volume. Target ≥30–40% in healthy liver, higher with impairment.

alpps.name: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Associating Liver Partition and Portal vein ligation for Staged hepatectomy
alpps.role: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Two-stage hepatectomy technique that accelerates FLR hypertrophy.
